title: agrostis dulcis
intro: Agrostis dulcis, also known as sweet bent or meadow sweet, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its cooling and detoxifying properties. The health benefits of Agrostis dulcis include reducing inflammation, relieving fever, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
